indication: Indicated for treatment of superficial vessels and pigmented lesions.
Indicated for rehydration of vaginal and vestibular mucous membranes and slight hypotrophy of the vulvar labia majora and pubis by intradermal injections.
Intended to use focused ultrasound to coagulate tissue for eyebrow lifting and thigh skin elasticity improvement.
Indicated for correction of blemishes related to ageing and for maintaining skin elasticity; may be used on the face, décolleté, neck, hands, arms and body at a physician's discretion.
Intended for aesthetic facial rejuvenation and contouring through wrinkle reduction and skin-laxity improvement by toning and lifting muscles and skin.
Intended for treatment of obesity by fat reduction through neuromuscular stimulation, radiofrequency-induced lipolysis and increased blood flow.
Intended for treatment of localized adipose accumulations in patients with BMI greater than or equal to 30 through controlled cooling and adipose tissue reduction.
Indicated for the external intimate area, inner thighs and groin to reduce pigmentary imperfections and improve skin quality, elasticity and appearance.
Indicated as an intensive biorevitalization treatment for fine wrinkles, dull skin, anti-aging care and toning of skin tissue.
Indicated for treatment of large body areas through soft tissue coagulation.
Indicated for treatment of scars, especially acne scars, injury scars, burn scars and stretch marks.
Indicated for general dermatological procedures for electrocoagulation and hemostasis.
Indicated for treatment of wrinkles and lax skin on the face, jawline and neck, including thin skin around the eyes and mouth.
Indicated for incision, excision, ablation, vaporization and coagulation of body soft tissues; with the scanning unit, indicated for ablative skin resurfacing.
Indicated for treatment of benign pigmented epidermal and cutaneous lesions and benign cutaneous vascular lesions.
Intended for dynamic wrinkles and folds such as nasolabial folds.
Indicated as a skin beautifier for face and body and for treatment of scars, stretch marks and prevention of dermal ageing.
